title: Law Is Forced to Eat It
description: Pages 17–21 focus on law is forced to eat it, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Flevance Citizens, Corazon, Gladius, Unknown person #3, Luffy as corazon risks everything to steal the Ope Ope no Mi for Law, turning the flashback into a desperate rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you planning to do with me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm going to heal your illness.

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: We'll go around to every hospital there is.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I told you, there's no friggin' cure!!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: POPIPU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: PURU RURU...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you calling Doflamingo?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heeey! Help meee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Muffins!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Baggels...!! It's me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ahh... Rosinate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: i need to step away from my mission post for a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Did you run into some trouble?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Just something I need to take care of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see, very well... how are those kids?

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: that family has already become rather infamous... be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even with you picking on them, they won't leave?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No matter what I do, those 3 just won't budge...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: under- stood.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Marine HQ, Admiral Sengoku

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'll leave this in your charge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Do as you please...I'll be waiting for your report.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I'll send the details in a "let- ter".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Click

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Admiral Sengoku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's the transfer applicant you talked to yes- Tenday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Yes... enter.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Commander DonquilJote Rosinante

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...So you'd like a transfer? I'm familiar with your reputation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: This is your first year officially enlisted, but you've put in great effort already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You want to be transferred to the [GS]?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: --Though first I'd be remiss if I didnt point out the fried egg stuck to your left cheek...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: My name is Vergo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Where did you just call?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You were saying some- thing about a "mission"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Don't even tell me you're a "Marine"?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Do you hate the mariness?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I hate anyone and everything connected to the gov- ernment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I'm not a marine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: For reals?!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Hey!! I don't want to go to the hospital!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Don't start whining all of sudden...you'll sound like an ordinary kid...

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: Just look at this huge hospital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: They've got to be able to heal you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: "Amber LEAD SICK- NESS"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: It's been around for some time now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Has a medicine been discovered for it yet, Doctor?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I... I'm sorry, but where are you from...?

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: "Flevance".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: KyaA AAAAA AAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Hurry up and go get us some gloves, disinfectant, and a gas mask!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: He's gonna infect uss..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: And then call the police and get in touch with the government!! Quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Enough...!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Just look!! I'm not even human any- more!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: White Monster-!! Please, just go back to where you came from!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Hey, you!! You have some nerve bringing that kind of_kid around here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how many hundreds of patients we have here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Emergency broadcast!!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: A child with amber lead sickness is currently inside the hospital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Bafwah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: That big guy got violent with me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Disin- Fect ALL OF THIS, IMMEDI- ATELY!!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: That hospital was the worst!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... did that make you think of the past...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: ...this is why I said I didn't want to go to the hospital!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: But we'll find a capable doctor next time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Just forget it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Amber LEAD SICK- NEEESS..!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Someone, anyone, come quick!!!! There's a Survivor from the white city!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: He has white blemishes on his skin--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Come on, let's go to the next one... they'll heal you there, I'm sure of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: Just let it go already!! I'm not inter- Ested!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: Hello, World govern-ment?!

dialogue.speaker: Flevance Citizens
dialogue.text: There's a Survivor from Flevance! Why didn't you exterminate them all?!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Look, law!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: The people of this town seem kind!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: NOO..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #64
dialogue.text: JUWAAH, WE'RE GONNA GET IN- FECTED!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: Go away ~!!

summary: Law Is Forced to Eat It advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Flevance Citizens, Corazon, Gladius, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
